# SBOM Assessment against BSI TR-03183-2

**Version assessed:** BSI TR-03183-2 v2.1.0 (2025-08-20)
**SBOM assessed:** `target/bom.json` (CycloneDX 1.6, generated by `cyclonedx-maven-plugin` 2.9.1 with `makeAggregateBom`)
**Assessment date:** 2026-03-05

## Summary

The generated SBOM uses CycloneDX 1.6, which meets the minimum format version required by TR-03183-2 v2.1.0 (┬¦4). The dependency graph is complete (all 43 components appear in the `dependencies` section), and all components carry SPDX licence identifiers and Package URLs. However, several required data fields are systematically absent from every component, and two required SBOM-level fields are missing entirely.

| Category | Status |
| --- | --- |
| SBOM format (CycloneDX Ōēź 1.6) | Ō£ģ Compliant |
| SBOM serialNumber (SBOM-URI) | Ō£ģ Present |
| SBOM lifecycle phase | Ō£ģ `build` |
| SBOM timestamp | ŌØī Missing |
| SBOM creator (`metadata.manufacturer`) | ŌØī Missing |
| Component name / version / purl | Ō£ģ Present on all 43 components |
| Component creator (`manufacturer` or `publisher`) | ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ Missing on 11 external components |
| Component filename (`bsi:component:filename`) | ŌØī Missing on all 43 components |
| SHA-512 hash ŌĆö first-party components | ŌØī Missing (no hashes at all) |
| SHA-512 hash ŌĆö external components | ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ SHA-512 present in `hashes[]`; not in `externalReferences[type=distribution]` as the TR mapping prescribes |
| Executable property (`bsi:component:executable`) | ŌØī Missing on all 43 components |
| Archive property (`bsi:component:archive`) | ŌØī Missing on all 43 components |
| Structured property (`bsi:component:structured`) | ŌØī Missing on all 43 components |
| Distribution licences (SPDX identifier) | Ō£ģ Present ŌĆö `acknowledgement: "concluded"` not set |
| Dependency completeness (`compositions`) | ŌØī Missing |
| Original licences (`acknowledgement: "declared"`) | ŌØī Missing on all components |

---

## Required data fields for the SBOM itself (┬¦5.2.1)

### ŌØī SBOM creator (`metadata.manufacturer`)

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.1, Table 2):** The SBOM MUST carry an email address or URL identifying the entity that created the SBOM. In CycloneDX 1.6 this maps to `metadata.manufacturer[].url` or `metadata.manufacturer[].contact[].email` (Table 8).

**Current state:** `metadata` contains `tools`, `component`, `lifecycles`, and `properties` ŌĆö but no `manufacturer` element.

**Fix:** Add to the CycloneDX Maven plugin configuration in `pom.xml`:

```xml
<configuration>
  <metadata>
    <manufacturers>
      <manufacturer>
        <name>Eclipse Foundation</name>
        <urls>
          <url>https://github.com/eclipse-csi/codesign-maven-plugin</url>
        </urls>
      </manufacturer>
    </manufacturers>
  </metadata>
</configuration>
```

---

### ŌØī SBOM timestamp (`metadata.timestamp`)

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.1, Table 2):** The SBOM MUST carry a date-and-time of data compilation. In CycloneDX 1.6 this maps to `metadata.timestamp` (Table 8).

**Current state:** `metadata.timestamp` is absent. (The `cdx:reproducible` property in the current config explicitly suppresses it to enable reproducible builds.)

**Tension with reproducibility:** The `cdx:reproducible: enabled` property is intentionally set in the current configuration to enable build reproducibility ŌĆö a desirable property for supply-chain integrity. A fixed timestamp makes the SBOM non-reproducible. Options:

1. **Inject the release timestamp at release time** (recommended): Leave `cdx:reproducible` enabled for snapshot/CI builds; override with `-Dcdx.timestamp=...` or set via Maven property only during the `release` profile.
2. **Remove `cdx:reproducible`**: Always embed the current build timestamp. Reproducibility is lost.

---

## Required data fields for each component (┬¦5.2.2, Table 3 + Table 9)

### ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ Component creator ŌĆö 11 external components missing

**Requirement:** Each component MUST carry the email address or URL of its creator. In CycloneDX 1.6 this maps to `components[].manufacturer[].url` or `components[].manufacturer[].contact[].email` (Table 9). The `publisher` field used for the remaining 29 components does not directly map to the TR "component creator" requirement ŌĆö `publisher` is the vendor/distributor, whereas `manufacturer` is the creator.

**Missing on:**

| Component | Version |
| --- | --- |
| okhttp-jvm | 5.3.2 |
| okio-jvm | 3.16.4 |
| kotlin-stdlib | 2.3.10 |
| annotations (JetBrains) | 13.0 |
| gson | 2.13.2 |
| jspecify | 1.0.0 |
| aopalliance | 1.0 |
| guava | 33.5.0-jre |
| failureaccess | 1.0.3 |
| javax.inject | 1 |
| picocli | 4.7.7 |

**Fix:** The `cyclonedx-maven-plugin` populates `manufacturer` from Maven POM metadata. These components do not declare `<organization>` with a URL in their published POMs. Upstream data enrichment would be required (e.g. via a custom CycloneDX plugin configuration with component-level overrides or a post-processing step).

---

### ŌØī Filename of component ŌĆö missing on all 43 components

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.2, Table 3 + Table 9):** Each component MUST carry its actual filename (not the path). In CycloneDX 1.6 this maps to `components[].properties[name="bsi:component:filename"]`.

**Current state:** No component carries a `bsi:component:filename` property.

**Fix:** The `cyclonedx-maven-plugin` does not add BSI-specific properties automatically. A post-processing step (or a custom plugin extension) must add `bsi:component:filename` to each component. For Maven JAR artifacts the filename follows the pattern `<artifactId>-<version>.jar` (or `.pom`, `.maven-plugin`, etc.).

---

### ŌØī SHA-512 hash of deployable component ŌĆö first-party components

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.2, Table 3 + Table 9):** The deployable form of each component MUST be identified by a SHA-512 hash. In CycloneDX 1.6 this maps to `components[].externalReferences[type="distribution"].hashes[alg="SHA-512"]` (Table 9).

**Current state:**

- **External components (40):** SHA-512 is present in `components[].hashes[]`. This is the component-level hash array, not the distribution reference ŌĆö it partially satisfies the intent but does not match the CycloneDX mapping prescribed by the TR.
- **First-party components (codesign-api, codesign-maven-plugin, codesign-cli):** No hashes at all. These are SNAPSHOT builds; hashes cannot be computed until the JAR is finalised. They MUST be added to the release SBOM.

**Fix:**

1. For first-party components: generate the SBOM **after** packaging (already the case with `prepare-package` phase) but ensure the JAR hash is embedded. The `cyclonedx-maven-plugin` should populate this automatically when the artifact exists; verify the plugin version supports it.
2. For all components: add the SHA-512 hash under `externalReferences[type=distribution]` in addition to (or instead of) the top-level `hashes[]`.

---

### ŌØī Executable, Archive, and Structured properties ŌĆö missing on all 43 components

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.2, Table 3):** Each component MUST carry:

- `bsi:component:executable` ŌĆö values: `executable` / `non-executable` (┬¦8.1.4)
- `bsi:component:archive` ŌĆö values: `archive` / `no archive` (┬¦8.1.5)
- `bsi:component:structured` ŌĆö values: `structured` / `unstructured` (┬¦8.1.6)

These are CycloneDX `properties` entries using the BSI taxonomy (Table 9 / Table 10 via `bsi:component:*` keys; see <https://github.com/BSI-Bund/tr-03183-cyclonedx-property-taxonomy>).

**Current state:** No component carries any of these three properties.

**Correct values for this project's artifacts:**

| Type | Executable | Archive | Structured |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| JAR (library/plugin) | `executable` (JVM bytecode) | `archive` | `structured` |
| Native binary (CLI) | `executable` | `no archive` | `unstructured` |
| POM file | `non-executable` | `no archive` | `structured` |

**Fix:** Requires a post-processing step or a custom enrichment that iterates over all components, classifies them by artifact type, and adds the three `bsi:component:*` properties.

---

## Required data fields: dependency completeness (┬¦5.2.2 / ┬¦5.1)

### ŌØī `compositions` section missing

**Requirement (┬¦5.1 / CycloneDX note in Table 9):** The completeness of dependency enumeration MUST be indicated. In CycloneDX 1.6 this is done via a `compositions` section with `aggregate: "complete"` (or `"incomplete"` / `"unknown"`). Components without dependencies MUST appear as empty elements in the dependency graph (this is already satisfied).

**Current state:** The `compositions` section is absent.

**Fix:**

```json
"compositions": [{
  "aggregate": "complete",
  "assemblies": [
    "pkg:maven/org.eclipse.csi/codesign-parent@1.0.0-SNAPSHOT?type=pom"
  ]
}]
```

---

## Additional data fields (┬¦5.2.3 / ┬¦5.2.4)

These fields MUST be included **if they exist and fulfil format requirements**.

### Ō£ģ SBOM-URI (`serialNumber`)

The `serialNumber` field (`urn:uuid:...`) satisfies the SBOM-URI requirement (┬¦5.2.3 / Table 10).

### ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ Distribution URI (`externalReferences[type=distribution]`)

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.4, Table 11):** If the deployable form of the component is publicly downloadable, its URI MUST be included under `externalReferences[type=distribution]`.

**Current state:** Only 10 Maven components (all `org.apache.maven`) carry a `distribution` external reference. External components from other groups (OkHttp, Kotlin, Gson, picocli, etc.) do not, even though their JARs are publicly available on Maven Central.

**Fix:** Add Maven Central download URLs: `https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/<group-path>/<artifactId>/<version>/<artifactId>-<version>.jar` for all publicly released components. The SHA-512 hash from Maven Central should be placed in this reference (Table 9).

### ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ Original licences (`acknowledgement: "declared"`)

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.4, Table 11):** The original licences declared by the component creator MUST be recorded (if known), mapped in CycloneDX as `licenses[].expression` with `acknowledgement: "declared"`.

**Requirement (┬¦5.2.2, Table 3):** Distribution licences (the licences under which this SBOM's creator distributes the component) MUST be present with `acknowledgement: "concluded"` in CycloneDX.

**Current state:** Licences use `licenses[].license.id` without any `acknowledgement` annotation. Neither "declared" nor "concluded" is set on any component.

**Fix:** Populate `acknowledgement: "concluded"` on the existing `licenses` entries (distribution licence = the licence under which the project uses/ships the dependency). If the original licence is known and different, add a second entry with `acknowledgement: "declared"`.

### Ō£ģ Other unique identifiers (purl)

All 43 components carry a Package URL (`purl`), satisfying the "other unique identifiers" requirement (┬¦5.2.4).

### Ō£ģ Source code URI (partial)

Components carry a VCS reference in `externalReferences[type=vcs]` for the project's own repository. External components carry website references. Where source repository URLs are available from Maven POM metadata they are present; no explicit gap beyond what the plugin populates.

---

## Optional data fields (┬¦5.2.5)

| Field | Status |
| --- | --- |
| Effective licence (`bsi:component:effectiveLicense`) | Not present ŌĆö would be useful but is optional |
| Hash of source code | Not present ŌĆö optional, no standard algorithm yet |
| URL of security.txt | Not present ŌĆö optional; Eclipse Foundation has `/.well-known/security.txt` |

---

## Action items

| Priority | Item | Effort |
| --- | --- | --- |
| MUST | Add `metadata.timestamp` (at release time; keep `cdx:reproducible` for CI) | Low ŌĆö Maven property or release profile |
| MUST | Add `metadata.manufacturer` | Low ŌĆö plugin `<metadata>` config |
| MUST | Add `bsi:component:filename` to all components | Medium ŌĆö post-processing script |
| MUST | Add `bsi:component:executable`, `bsi:component:archive`, `bsi:component:structured` to all components | Medium ŌĆö post-processing script with artifact-type classification |
| MUST | Add SHA-512 in `externalReferences[type=distribution]` for all components; ensure first-party JARs have hashes in release SBOM | Medium ŌĆö post-processing script |
| MUST | Add `compositions` with `aggregate: "complete"` | Low ŌĆö post-processing script |
| MUST | Set `acknowledgement: "concluded"` on all `licenses` entries | Low ŌĆö post-processing script |
| SHOULD | Add `acknowledgement: "declared"` (original licences) where known | Low ŌĆö post-processing script |
| SHOULD | Add `manufacturer` for the 11 external components missing it | High ŌĆö requires upstream data or manual mapping |
| SHOULD | Add `externalReferences[type=distribution]` URLs for all public Maven Central artifacts | Medium ŌĆö derivable from purl |
| MAY | Add `bsi:component:effectiveLicense` | Low |
| MAY | Add `security.txt` URL for Eclipse Foundation components | Low |
